Node.help: Range of multiple MAC addresses for fine grained configuration

PropertyString.name: mac
PropertyString.description: base value used when the plugin creates a mac addresses.
PropertyString.help: When a range of multiple MACs are created with this plugin, this value is the base value used to create the addresses in the range, this property is used in conjunction with 'incrementBy' as an incrementor.

PropertyString.name: incrementBy
PropertyString.description: Incrementor used when the plugin creates a range of MACs.
PropertyString.help: When a range of multiple macs are created with this plugin, this value is the incrementor used to create the addresses in the range, this property is used in conjunction with 'mac' as a base value.

PropertyInt.name: mtu
PropertyInt.help: Maximum Transmission Unit. The largest packet that a given network medium can carry. Ethernet, for example, has a fixed MTU of 1500 bytes, ATM has a fixed MTU of 48 bytes, and PPP has a negotiated MTU that is usually between 500 and 2000 bytes.
